source_pr.title: executor: support fast sample for fast analyze
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
A sub PR for fast analyze. It does the fast sample.
Reference: #9973 

### What is changed and how it works?
- The first region and the last region do not cover the whole table scanning completely. The pool sampling algorithm is used to determine whether to join the sample pool or not.
- Full coverage region statistics row count, random in row count interval.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test
 - Integration test
 - Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)

Code changes

 - None

Side effects

 - Increased code complexity

Related changes

 - #9973

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: executor: support fast sample for fast analyze.
fix_pattern: executor: support fast sample for fast analyze
